prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
A fault event was recently logged on T-006. Retrieve the fault details, estimate the expected repair downtime, open a corrective work order, and then mark it as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should retrieve the fault record, estimate downtime, create a corrective work order, and update its status to in-progress with the downtime noted.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [wo] list_fault_records — Retrieve the fault details for the recent fault event on T-006
  Step 2: [wo] get_fault_record — Get the specific fault record for the recent fault event on T-006 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the expected repair downtime for the fault on T-006 (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [wo] create_work_order — Open a corrective work order for the fault on T-006 (depends on steps [2, 3])
  Step 5: [wo] update_work_order — Mark the work order as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded (depends on steps [4])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the fault details for the recent fault event on T-006",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "list_fault_records",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-006"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-006\",\n  \"fault_id\": \"F005\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Insulation Degradation\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Beta\",\n  \"voltage_v\": 11000,\n  \"current_a\": 306,\n  \"power_load_mw\": 54.89,\n  \"temperature_c\": 27.1,\n  \"wind_speed_kmh\": 20.5,\n  \"weather_condition\": \"Windy\",\n  \"maintenance_status\": \"Scheduled\",\n  \"component_health\": \"Normal\",\n  \"duration_hrs\": 2.0,\n  \"downtime_hrs\": 4\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Get the specific fault record for the recent fault event on T-006",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "get_fault_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "fault_id": "F005"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-006\",\n  \"fault_id\": \"F005\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Insulation Degradation\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Beta\",\n  \"voltage_v\": 11000,\n  \"current_a\": 306,\n  \"power_load_mw\": 54.89,\n  \"temperature_c\": 27.1,\n  \"wind_speed_kmh\": 20.5,\n  \"weather_condition\": \"Windy\",\n  \"maintenance_status\": \"Scheduled\",\n  \"component_health\": \"Normal\",\n  \"duration_hrs\": 2.0,\n  \"downtime_hrs\": 4\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Estimate the expected repair downtime for the fault on T-006",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-006",
      "severity": "High",
      "fault_type": "Insulation Degradation"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Invalid severity 'High'. Must be one of: ['critical', 'high', 'low', 'medium']\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Invalid severity 'High'. Must be one of: ['critical', 'high', 'low', 'medium']",
    "success": false
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Open a corrective work order for the fault on T-006",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-006",
      "issue_description": "Insulation Degradation fault",
      "priority": "high",
      "fault_type": "Insulation Degradation",
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 4
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-31EB1A72\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-006\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Insulation Degradation fault\",\n  \"priority\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Insulation Degradation\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 4.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T09:32:46.115055Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 5,
    "task": "Mark the work order as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-31EB1A72",
      "status": "in-progress",
      "priority": "high",
      "assigned_technician": null,
      "note": "Estimated repair downtime: 4 hours"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Work order 'WO-31EB1A72' not found in this session.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Work order 'WO-31EB1A72' not found in this session.",
    "success": false
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The fault details for T-006 are: transformer id T-006, fault id F005, fault type Insulation Degradation, with an expected downtime of 4 hours. A corrective work order WO-31EB1A72 was opened with the issue description "Insulation Degradation fault" and priority "high". However, due to errors, the expected repair downtime could not be accurately estimated and the work order could not be marked as in-progress.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Improve error handling for downtime estimation and work order updates"}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve error handling for downtime estimation and work order updates
